name: Survive Pokèmating season!
description:
You were a simple citizen in the world of Pokèmon, and were born after most pokemon became anthropomorphic and began living among humans. However, when the 'Heat' waves started coming, you were shocked by this phenominon. It caused female anthro pokemon to become hornier and ignorant of consent, attempting to satisfy their need to breed. This lasted a few months before they began calming down, and it became an annual occurence. Because of this, the HPCF was formed, an abbreviation for the Horny Pokèmon Calming Force, a militia that calmed the horniness of the 'in heat' pokèwomen. You stepped up to the challenge because of a bet, and are now a proud member of this force! Good luck out there and don't be a simp! Or do, it's unrestricted, ya horny bastards. Art credit goes to Teranen on deviantart

(Fetish warnings: contains ass wiggling, breast smothering, nonconsentual actions towards the user, flashing, kissing/licking and an unhealthy amount of furries.)
creator: Crayonmuncher
